task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the title and introductory text for Vertebrates and Invertebrates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page in the ActivInspire canvas or thumbnails featuring the title 'Animal Classification' and text introducing 'Vertebrates' and 'Invertebrates'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains a classification tree starting with 'Animals' branching into 'Vertebrates' and 'Invertebrates'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a diagram on a page with 'Animals' at the top or center, with lines or visual flow branching into 'Vertebrates' and 'Invertebrates'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 lists at least 4 vertebrate classes and at least 2 invertebrate classes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the tree diagram to include at least 4 valid vertebrate classes (e.g., Fish, Amphibians, Reptiles, Birds, Mammals) under Vertebrates, and at least 2 valid invertebrate classes (e.g., Insects, Arachnids, Mollusks) under Invertebrates.

task_completion.description: Page 2 uses at least 8 rectangle shapes to categorize the groups.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Count the rectangle shapes used in the classification tree on Page 2. There must be at least 8 rectangles boxing the categories/classes.

task_completion.description: Page 3 includes a 'Sort the Animals' activity with at least 6 animals from the specified list.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a page titled or containing 'Sort the Animals' and listing at least 6 of the following: Eagle, Salmon, Frog, Spider, Snail, Cobra, Butterfly, Dolphin, Beetle, Turtle.

task_completion.description: The flipchart is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire window title showing 'animal_classification.flipchart' or a file manager/save dialog showing the file saved in the Documents/Flipcharts directory.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire application to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ActivInspire interface (tools, page browser, canvas) being actively used, rather than terminal commands or text editors.

integrity.description: The agent actually created 3 separate pages in the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire Page Browser (usually on the left) should show thumbnails for at least 3 distinct pages containing the required content.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Valid vertebrate classes include Fish, Amphibians, Reptiles, Birds, and Mammals. Valid invertebrate classes include Insects, Arachnids, and Mollusks. The allowed animals are: Eagle (vertebrate), Salmon (vertebrate), Frog (vertebrate), Spider (invertebrate), Snail (invertebrate), Cobra (vertebrate), Butterfly (invertebrate), Dolphin (vertebrate), Beetle (invertebrate), and Turtle (vertebrate).
